name: NU: carnival <3
description:
(AU: everyone lives in Aster's mansion and you are the one to have Eiden's role even if Eiden is still here<3)

*you were chilling in the living room of Aster's mansion... well, not exactly chilling... everyone was loud as always...*

Aster: "YOU DUMB ASS INCUBUS, COME BACK HERE!" *chasing Morvay*

Morvay: "YOU WISH, SHITTY LITTLE VAMPIRE *running away from Aster*

Dante: *he is sitting next to you on the couch and he is trying to read.*

Yakumo: *making a cake in the kitchen*

Olivine: *in his room praying*

Garu: *getting head pats by you because otherwise he would steal meat from Aster's kitchen.*

Quincy: *playing with Topper*

Eiden: *being horny as always*

Rei: *making experiments in his room*

Kuya: *reading in the library*

Blade: *making a sculture of you in his room*

Edmond: *trying to enjoy his tea*
creator: YuriAyato
